# Pattern Paradise

> Pattern Paradise is a modern, community-powered marketplace for crochet and knitting patterns. Designers can upload and sell patterns, host tester calls, and connect with makers through real-time chat. Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

## Overview

Pattern Paradise (https://pattern-paradise.shop) enables:

- **Pattern Sales**: Designers upload patterns with photos, files, and detailed descriptions for sale or free download
- **Tester Calls**: Host pattern testing sessions and get feedback from real makers before release
- **Real-time Chat**: Communicate with testers during projects
- **Mystery Patterns**: Join or offer mystery pattern bundles to promote hidden gems
- **User Profiles**: Public creator profiles with pattern portfolios and reviews
- **Multi-language Support**: Available in English and German

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/quikk-software/pattern-paradise-webportal/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, setup instructions, and contribution guidelines
- [How-To Guides](https://pattern-paradise.shop/how-to): User guides for designers and testers
- [About Page](https://pattern-paradise.shop/about): Platform mission and features
- [Terms & Privacy](https://pattern-paradise.shop/terms-and-privacy): Legal terms and privacy policy

## Key Features

- [Browse Patterns](https://pattern-paradise.shop/browse): Search and filter patterns by craft type, category, skill level, and price
- [Free Crochet Patterns](https://pattern-paradise.shop/browse/free-crochet-patterns): Curated free crochet patterns
- [Free Knitting Patterns](https://pattern-paradise.shop/browse/free-knitting-patterns): Curated free knitting patterns
- [Tester Calls](https://pattern-paradise.shop/app/tester-calls): Browse and apply for active pattern testing opportunities
- [Swipe Discovery](https://pattern-paradise.shop/swipe): Tinder-style pattern discovery interface
- [Pro Subscription](https://pattern-paradise.shop/pro): Premium features for serious designers

## API & Data

- [RSS Feed - Crochet](https://pattern-paradise.shop/rss/crocheting): RSS feed for new crochet patterns
- [RSS Feed - Knitting](https://pattern-paradise.shop/rss/knitting): RSS feed for new knitting patterns
- [Sitemap](https://pattern-paradise.shop/sitemap.xml): Full sitemap with all patterns, users, and pages

## Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/[lang]/           # Internationalized pages (en, de)
│   ├── about/            # About page
│   ├── app/              # Authenticated app routes
│   │   ├── products/     # Pattern details and mystery patterns
│   │   ├── secure/       # Protected routes (chat, sell, test, profile)
│   │   └── tester-calls/ # Tester call listings
│   ├── auth/             # Login, registration, password reset
│   ├── browse/           # Pattern browsing and filtering
│   ├── help/             # Help center
│   ├── how-to/           # User guides
│   ├── pro/              # Pro subscription page
│   ├── swipe/            # Pattern swipe discovery
│   ├── terms-and-privacy/# Legal pages
│   └── users/            # Public user profiles
├── components/           # Shared UI components
├── lib/
│   ├── api/              # API client functions
│   ├── auth/             # Authentication utilities
│   ├── components/       # Feature-specific components
│   ├── hooks/            # Custom React hooks
│   ├── icons/            # SVG icon components
│   └── redux/            # Redux store, slices, and selectors
└── @types/               # TypeScript type definitions
```

## Brand Assets

- [Logo & Brand Kit](https://github.com/quikk-software/pattern-paradise-logo): Official logos in SVG, PNG, WebP formats with usage guidelines

## Optional

- [Next.js Documentation](https://nextjs.org/docs): Framework documentation for Next.js 16
- [shadcn/ui Components](https://ui.shadcn.com): Component library documentation
- [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/docs): Styling framework documentation
- [React Hook Form](https://react-hook-form.com): Form handling library
- [Zod Validation](https://zod.dev): Schema validation library
- [next-intl](https://next-intl.dev): Internationalization for Next.js
